name: Breakout
description: Breakout is a single-player arcade game centered around a rectangular paddle controlled by the player and a ball that bounces around the screen, breaking bricks. The play area consists of a rectangular field with a wall of bricks at the top. The paddle is positioned at the bottom of the screen and can move horizontally. The ball is launched upwards and bounces off the walls, the paddle, and the bricks. When the ball collides with a brick, the brick disappears, and the ball rebounds. The player's objective is to clear all the bricks from the play area. If the ball falls past the paddle, the player loses a life. The game ends when the player runs out of lives or clears all the bricks. There may be multiple levels, each with a different arrangement of bricks. The ball's speed may increase as the game progresses. Also, the number of hits to destroy a brick can also increase based on the game level. The Paddle can move only along the horizontal axis, but the ball can move along the horizontal and vertical axes.

controls.arrow_left: Move the paddle to the left
controls.arrow_right: Move the paddle to the right
controls.space: Launch the ball at the start of the level, or restart after losing a life
